scholarships.title: Chester County Community Foundation Scholarships
scholarships.desc: Multiple scholarships available to Chester County high school graduates through the Chester County Community Foundation. Awards based on specific criteria set by donors.
scholarships.eligibility: Graduating seniors from Chester County high schools. Must apply through school guidance counselors or complete the Universal Application.
scholarships.how: Apply through school guidance counselor or complete Universal Application online

scholarships.title: Western Chester County Chamber Academic Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Annual scholarship for graduating seniors in the Western Chester County Chamber service area with outstanding academic performance pursuing higher education.
scholarships.eligibility: Graduating seniors residing in Atglen, Caln, Christiana, Coatesville, East Brandywine, East Fallowfield, East Nantmeal, Elverson, Highland, Honey Brook, Modena, Parkesburg, Sadsbury, South Coatesville, Valley, Wallace, West Bradford, West Brandywine, West Caln, West Fallowfield, West Nantmeal, or West Sadsbury
scholarships.how: Apply online at westernchestercounty.com or email [email protected]
scholarships.source: Western Chester County Chamber of Commerce

scholarships.title: Western Chester County Chamber Trades Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Scholarship for local high school students from career and technical programs pursuing trade degrees/certificates or entering directly into the trades workforce.
scholarships.eligibility: High school students from area career and technical programs in the Western Chester County Chamber service area
scholarships.how: Apply online at westernchestercounty.com or email [email protected]
scholarships.source: Western Chester County Chamber of Commerce

scholarships.title: Thomas A. and Mary Jo Russo Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Scholarship for graduating seniors who are residents of Chester County, PA or Delaware County pursuing business-related fields or trade/vocational programs.
scholarships.eligibility: Graduating seniors residing in Chester or Delaware counties in Pennsylvania. Must demonstrate financial need and pursue business-related field or trade/vocational program
scholarships.how: Check with local high school guidance counselor or scholarship search engines

scholarships.title: Lancaster/Chester County Nursing Scholarships
scholarships.desc: Two nursing scholarships for graduating high school students entering the nursing profession upon 2026 graduation.
scholarships.eligibility: Graduating high school students residing in Lancaster or Chester County entering nursing profession in 2026
scholarships.how: Contact local high school guidance counselor

scholarships.title: Central Penn College Regional Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Regional scholarship for high school graduates from central PA counties with GPA of 2.2 or higher attending Central Penn College.
scholarships.eligibility: 2025 or 2026 high school graduates from Adams, Dauphin, Cumberland, Perry, Lancaster, Lebanon, or York counties with 2.2+ GPA
scholarships.how: Apply directly to Central Penn College

internships.title: Chester County Adult Probation & Parole Internship
internships.desc: Internship opportunities working with Probation/Parole Officers in supervision units or special programs/research areas.
internships.eligibility: College students enrolled in formal for-credit internship/practicum class. Minimum 16 hours per week required.
internships.how: Complete Application for Student Internship and submit through supervising professor

internships.title: Chester County Library Science Internship
internships.desc: Practical work experience in library field for Library Science degree candidates. Option to work at Chester County Library or Henrietta Hankin Branch.
internships.eligibility: Currently pursuing degree in Library Science
internships.how: Email Susan Walraed at 610-280-3235 or apply through county website

internships.title: Tague Lumber Door Shop Intern
internships.desc: Internship at Tague Lumber's Door Shop in Phoenixville, PA. Part-time and full-time opportunities available.
internships.how: Apply through job search platforms or contact company directly

internships.title: Merck Future Talent Program - West Point
internships.desc: 12-week internship program in vaccine manufacturing division. Hands-on projects in manufacturing processes and optimization.
internships.eligibility: Full-time student status within 12 months post-graduation. Must work 35-40 hours/week for 12 weeks (May/June-August 2026)
internships.how: Apply through company career website or job search platforms

internships.title: Chester County History Center IDEAL Summer Internship
internships.desc: 9-week paid internship for graduate students focusing on historical artifacts. Covers curatorial and collections management tasks.
internships.eligibility: Graduate student focusing on historical artifacts, material culture, or public history
internships.how: Email application to Ellen Endslow at eendslow@mycchc.org

internships.title: Chester County History Center Development Internship
internships.desc: Summer internship in development and fundraising for museum operations. 9 weeks, 30 hours/week.
internships.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in relevant field preferred. Interest in nonprofit development and Chester County region helpful.
internships.how: Submit cover letter, resume, and two professional references

internships.title: CliftonLarsonAllen High School Summer Internship
internships.desc: Professional services internship for high school students (16+). Includes client site visits and professional development opportunities.
internships.eligibility: Must be 16 years or older at start of internship. High school students interested in professional services.
internships.how: Apply through company website or job search platforms

universityPrograms.title: Penn Arts & Sciences Summer Academies
universityPrograms.desc: Intensive non-credit academies in sciences, arts and humanities including biomedical research, chemistry, neuroscience, social justice, experimental physics, and global culture.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Current 9th-11th grade students. Philadelphia residents at SDP schools may be eligible for free attendance with scholarship.
universityPrograms.how: Apply online at hs.sas.upenn.edu with essays, recommendations, and transcripts

universityPrograms.title: Penn Middle School Molecular Biology Program
universityPrograms.desc: Hands-on molecular biology laboratory experience for middle school students in Penn labs for one week.
universityPrograms.how: Apply online through Penn High School Programs

universityPrograms.title: Penn SAS Online Seminars
universityPrograms.desc: Interdisciplinary online programs integrating advanced theoretical concepts with real-world scenarios. Topics include ASL/deaf culture, leadership development, genomics, food systems.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Current 9th-11th grade students. International students welcome.

universityPrograms.title: Penn Pre-College Programs
universityPrograms.desc: Credit-bearing undergraduate courses taught by Penn faculty. Students live on campus and attend classes with Penn undergraduates.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Academically curious high school students. Residential and commuter options available.
universityPrograms.how: Apply online with transcripts, essays, recommendations, and test scores

universityPrograms.title: Philadelphia School District Arts Intensive Summer Program
universityPrograms.desc: 5-week hands-on program featuring rigorous studio practice and technical skill development for serious artists.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Students entering 7th-11th grade in Fall 2026. Philadelphia School District students.

universityPrograms.title: All City Orchestra Summer Academy
universityPrograms.desc: Premier summer instrumental music training camp in partnership with Mann Center, Philadelphia Orchestra, and Project 440.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Students entering 6th-12th grade in Fall 2026. Philadelphia School District students.

universityPrograms.title: Drexel University Summer Institutes
universityPrograms.desc: 1-2 week programs in Arts & Sciences, Biomedical Engineering, Business, Computing, Design, Engineering, Entrepreneurship, Medicine, Nursing, and Public Health.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Highly motivated high school students. Various grade requirements by program.
universityPrograms.how: Apply online through Drexel pre-college programs

universityPrograms.title: Temple University Pre-College Programs
universityPrograms.desc: Two-week workshops with morning and afternoon sessions. Nearly 30 options including Ecology, Photo Storytelling, Criminal Justice Reform.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Most accept rising sophomores, juniors, and seniors. Summer Academy only accepts rising juniors/seniors.

universityPrograms.title: Community College of Philadelphia High School Programs
universityPrograms.desc: Credit-bearing college courses for motivated Philadelphia high school students during summer program.
universityPrograms.how: Apply through Community College of Philadelphia

universityPrograms.title: Program in Algorithmic and Combinatorial Thinking
universityPrograms.desc: Month-long summer program exploring combinatorics, probability, and graph theory while developing proof-writing and analytical skills.
universityPrograms.eligibility: Motivated high school students interested in mathematical foundations of computer and data science
